text: Šł§√Ę-Mń©m .
The revelation of this Book is from Allah‚ÄĒthe Almighty, All-Wise.
We only created the heavens and the earth and everything in between for a purpose and an appointed term. Yet the disbelievers are turning away from what they have been warned about.

Ask ňĻthem, O Prophetňļ, ‚ÄúHave you considered whatever ňĻidolsňļ you invoke besides Allah? Show me what they have created on earth! Or do they have a share in ňĻthe creation ofňļ the heavens? Bring me a scripture ňĻrevealedňļ before this ňĻQuranňļ or a shred of knowledge, if what you say is true.‚ÄĚ
And who could be more astray than those who call upon others besides Allah‚ÄĒňĻothersňļ that cannot respond to them until the Day of Judgment, and are ňĻevenňļ unaware of their calls?
And when ňĻsuchňļ people will be gathered together, those ňĻgodsňļ will be their enemies and will disown their worship.
Whenever Our clear revelations are recited to them, the disbelievers say of the truth when it has come to them, ‚ÄúThis is pure magic.‚ÄĚ

Or do they say, ‚ÄúHe <sup foot_note=1030>1030</sup> has fabricated this ňĻQuranňļ!‚ÄĚ? Say, ňĻO Prophet,ňļ ‚ÄúIf I have done so, then there is nothing whatsoever you can do to save me from Allah. He knows best what ňĻslursňļ you indulge about it. Sufficient is He as a Witness between you and me. And He is the All-Forgiving, Most Merciful.‚ÄĚ
Say, ‚ÄúI am not the first messenger ever sent, nor do I know what will happen to me or you. I only follow what is revealed to me. And I am only sent with a clear warning.‚ÄĚ

Ask ňĻthem, O Prophetňļ, ‚ÄúConsider if this ňĻQuranňļ is ňĻtrulyňļ from Allah and you deny it, and a witness from the Children of Israel attests to it and then believes, <sup foot_note=1031>1031</sup> whereas you act arrogantly. Surely Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.‚ÄĚ

foot_notes.1031: This refers to ‚ÄôAbdull√Ęh ibn Sal√Ęm, a Jewish scholar, who embraced Islam when the Prophet ( Ô∑ļ ) emigrated to Medina.

text: The disbelievers say of the believers, ‚ÄúHad it been ňĻsomethingňļ good, they <sup foot_note=1032>1032</sup> would not have beaten us to it.‚ÄĚ Now since they reject its guidance, they will say, ‚ÄúňĻThis isňļ an ancient fabrication!‚ÄĚ

And before this ňĻQuranňļ the Book of Moses was ňĻrevealed asňļ a guide and mercy. And this Book is a confirmation, in the Arabic tongue, to warn those who do wrong, and as good news to those who do good.
Surely those who say, ‚ÄúOur Lord is Allah,‚ÄĚ and then remain steadfast‚ÄĒthere will be no fear for them, nor will they grieve.
It is they who will be the residents of Paradise, staying there forever, as a reward for what they used to do.

We have commanded people to honour their parents. Their mothers bore them in hardship and delivered them in hardship. Their ňĻperiod ofňļ bearing and weaning is thirty months. In time, when the child reaches their prime at the age of forty, they pray, ‚ÄúMy Lord! Inspire me to ňĻalwaysňļ be thankful for Your favours which You blessed me and my parents with, and to do good deeds that please You. And instil righteousness in my offspring. I truly repent to You, and I truly submit ňĻto Your Willňļ.‚ÄĚ
It is from these ňĻpeopleňļ that We will accept the good they did, and overlook their misdeeds‚ÄĒalong with the residents of Paradise, ňĻin fulfilment ofňļ the true promise they have been given.

But some scold their parents, ‚ÄúEnough with you! Are you warning me that I will be brought forth ňĻfrom the graveňļ, while many generations had already perished before me ňĻfor goodňļ?‚ÄĚ The parents cry to Allah for help, ňĻand warn their child,ňļ ‚ÄúPity you. Have faith! Surely Allah‚Äôs promise is true.‚ÄĚ But the deniers insist, ‚ÄúThis is nothing but ancient fables.‚ÄĚ
These are the ones against whom the fate of earlier communities of jinn and humans has been justified, ňĻforňļ they were truly losers.
Each ňĻof the two groupsňļ will be ranked according to what they have done so He may fully reward all. And none will be wronged.

ňĻWatch forňļ the Day ňĻwhenňļ the disbelievers will be exposed to the Fire. ňĻThey will be told,ňļ ‚ÄúYou ňĻalreadyňļ exhausted your ňĻshare ofňļ pleasures during your worldly life, and ňĻfullyňļ enjoyed them. So Today you will be rewarded with the torment of disgrace for your arrogance throughout the land with no right, and for your rebelliousness.‚ÄĚ

And remember the brother of ‚Äô»ād, when he warned his people, who inhabited the sand-hills <sup foot_note=1033>1033</sup> ‚ÄĒthere were certainly warners before and after him‚ÄĒňĻsaying,ňļ ‚ÄúWorship none but Allah. I truly fear for you the torment of a tremendous day.‚ÄĚ

foot_notes.1033: The people of ‚Äô»ād were the residents of the hills in the southern part of the Arabian Peninsula.

text: They argued, ‚ÄúHave you come to turn us away from our gods? Bring us then whatever you threaten us with, if what you say is true.‚ÄĚ
He responded, ‚ÄúThe knowledge ňĻof its timeňļ is only with Allah. I only convey to you what I have been sent with. But I can see that you are a people acting ignorantly.‚ÄĚ

Then when they saw the torment as a ňĻdenseňļ cloud approaching their valleys, they said ňĻhappilyňļ, ‚ÄúThis is a cloud bringing us rain.‚ÄĚ ňĻBut H√Ľd replied,ňļ ‚ÄúNo, it is what you sought to hasten: a ňĻfierceňļ wind carrying a painful punishment!‚ÄĚ
It destroyed everything by the command of its Lord, leaving nothing visible except their ruins. This is how We reward the wicked people.

Indeed, We had established them <sup foot_note=1034>1034</sup> in a way We have not established you ňĻMeccansňļ. And We gave them hearing, sight, and intellect. But neither their hearing, sight, nor intellect were of any benefit to them whatsoever, since they persisted in denying Allah‚Äôs signs. And ňĻsoňļ they were overwhelmed by what they used to ridicule.
We certainly destroyed the societies around you after having varied the signs so perhaps they would return ňĻto the Right Pathňļ.
Why then did those ňĻidolsňļ they took as gods‚ÄĒhoping to get closer ňĻto Himňļ‚ÄĒnot come to their aid? Instead, they failed them. That is ňĻthe result ofňļ their lies and their fabrications.

ňĻRemember, O Prophet,ňļ when We sent a group of jinn your way to listen to the Quran. Then, upon hearing it, they said ňĻto one anotherňļ, ‚ÄúListen quietly!‚ÄĚ Then when it was over, they returned to their fellow jinn as warners.
They declared, ‚ÄúO our fellow jinn! We have truly heard a scripture revealed after Moses, confirming what came before it. It guides to the truth and the Straight Way.
O our fellow jinn! Respond to the caller of Allah and believe in him, He will forgive your sins and protect you from a painful punishment.
And whoever does not respond to the caller of Allah will have no escape on earth, nor will they have any protectors against Him. It is they who are clearly astray.‚ÄĚ

Do they not realize that Allah, Who created the heavens and the earth and did not tire in creating them, <sup foot_note=1035>1035</sup> is able to give life to the dead? Yes ňĻindeedňļ! He is certainly Most Capable of everything.

foot_notes.1035: Or never failed in creating them.

text: And on the Day the disbelievers will be exposed to the Fire, ňĻthey will be asked,ňļ ‚ÄúIs this ňĻHereafterňļ not the truth?‚ÄĚ They will cry, ‚ÄúAbsolutely, by our Lord!‚ÄĚ It will be said, ‚ÄúThen taste the punishment for your disbelief.‚ÄĚ

So endure patiently, as did the Messengers of Firm Resolve. <sup foot_note=1036>1036</sup> And do not ňĻseek toňļ hasten ňĻthe tormentňļ for the deniers. On the Day they see what they have been threatened with, it will be as if they had only stayed ňĻin this worldňļ for an hour of a day. <sup foot_note=1037>1037</sup> ňĻThis isňļ a ňĻsufficientňļ warning! Then, will anyone be destroyed except the rebellious people?

foot_notes.1036: Noah, Abraham, Moses, Jesus, and MuŠł•ammad are called the Messengers of Firm Resolve.
foot_notes.1037: i.e., only for a very short period of time.
